description: Product Description AQOKKA - DEDICATED TO BETTER PRODUCTS FOR BABIES AQOKKA offers baby goods at an incredible value to parents Laid-back and simple is what we chase, we love, and what we do. It's who we are. We provide unique and exclusive quality lines, clothing, and accessories in our main collection. We believe cute designs and bright colors make everyone appreciate the beauty life has to offer. Enjoy the love your baby brings to your life with AQOKKA! AQOKKA Toddler Knee High Socks for Girls Fashion and colorful stripes knee-high socks give your children a cute look, boys and girls can wear them for outdoor activities. Used as skiing socks, football socks, basketball socks, baseball socks, softball socks, and even used as uniform socks to matching school uniforms, worn as dress socks with wedding and partis' skirts, and worn in daily life. Ruffle Baby Socks with Bows Comfortable and Breathable Breathability and shock absorption are essential functions of socks. These cozy stretch socks are made from a soft breathable and light cotton blend, which will keep your baby's feet dry and fresh. It's very comfortable to wear during the whole day with skirts and shorts. Features Fabric Type: Cotton blend Care Instructions: Machine Wash Baby Essential Variety Sizes and Colors Origin: Imported Pattern: Solid Ruffled Design The ruffled design makes your baby look more cute when on their feet. And they are not so tight that the baby feels uncomfortable. Stylish and Versatile These baby girl knee-high socks are easy to match with different styles of shoes, making your baby look cute and charming. Perfect Gifts AQOKKA knee-high socks are the perfect gift choice for your baby girl, as well as friends or family with baby girls. I am sure they will love this gift. AQOKKA Fashionable Baby Girls Knee High Socks Elegant ruffles and fashionable bow accessories are the biggest highlights of these socks. These socks are comfortable and breathable and come in various colors for you to choose from, which are suitable for all occasions and seasons! 5 Pack Baby Girl Knee High Socks AQOKKA 4 Pack Baby Girls Socks Eyelet Ruffle Lace Baby Socks Newborn Infant T...
